{{CargoRelic
|name=Almira
|class_id=22646
|rank=SS
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-18
|source=
|description=On May 18, 1705 AD, Handel's "Almira" was performed at the Hamburg Opera House and was a great success.<br>Under the guidance of his teacher, an aspiring Handel ventured to Hamburg, Germany, to expand his musical knowledge. During this period, he immersed himself in new experience. With the assistance of his friends, he composed Almira, an opera in Hamburg style with Italian-style arias to suit the vocalists. The recitatives were in German, ensuring that the audience would understand. Upon its premiere in Hamburg, the opera received a warm reception and enjoyed a total of twenty successful performances, marking a significant milestone in Handel's career.
|fame=54
|art=103
|fth=67
|civ=69
|tech=54
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Handel Collection|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|3name=Rinaldo|3rec=148.77M|3atk=406571|3defense=253204|3hp=24947122|3weak=38935
|4name=Water Music|4rec=279.07M|4atk=689355|4defense=413630|4hp=71064637|4weak=51051
|5name=Messiah|5rec=466.97M|5atk=1002397|5defense=582679|5hp=150167995|5weak=58506
|Arec=709.85M|Aatk=1437476|Adefense=810819|Ahp=364907936|Aweak=71408
}}}}
